services.label: SERVICES
services.heading: What we do
services.intro: Design, code, cloud and sound — under one roof, tailored for brands that want to stand out online.

items.title: Web Design
items.desc: Visual concepts, design systems and interfaces that feel premium — dark, sharp and considered down to the last detail.

items.title: Web Development
items.desc: Custom websites and web apps with Nuxt, Vue and modern tooling. Fast, scalable and built to last.

items.title: Cloud & Hosting
items.desc: Deploy, CDN, image optimisation and secure environments — so your site loads fast, anywhere in the world.

items.title: Sound Design
items.desc: Audio identity for brands and labels — from subtle UI feedback to atmospheric soundscapes that bring your site to life.

items.title: Motion & Interaction
items.desc: Scroll animations, page transitions and micro-interactions with GSAP — motion with intent, never decoration.

items.title: Brand & Strategy
items.desc: Visual identity, tone of voice and digital brand experience — consistent across website, socials and campaigns.
